arts.ttl: Saliba sees red as Arsenal go down to ten against Bournemouth!
arts.sum: William Saliba sees red as Arsenal go down to ten against Bournemouth!

arts.ttl: Arsenal go down to 10 men for the THIRD time this season as William Saliba's risky challenge on Evanilson is upgraded to a red card after lengthy VAR review
arts.sum: William Saliba became the third Arsenal player to be sent off this season after being shown a red against Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Follow live: Arsenal facing uphill battle after Saliba is sent off
arts.sum: Arsenal look to maintain their Premier League title tilt with win over Bournemouth, but Mikel Arteta's team will have to do so without Bukayo Saka who misses out through injury

arts.ttl: BREAKING: William Saliba sent off after VAR check with Arsenal star to miss Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Arsenal defender William Saliba was initially shown a yellow card for a foul on Bournemouth striker Evanilson but the French defender was then sent off after the incident was checked by VAR

Benjamin Sesko is still struggling to be the game-changer he needs to be if he wants to sign for a top club. Sesko ultimately snubbed these Premier League giants to sign a new deal at RB Leipzig despite the fact that Arsenal felt that they had a good chance of landing him.

arts.ttl: Freddie Ljungberg gives Arsenal perfect Alexander Isak transfer verdict
arts.sum: "I like Isak," the former Arsenal player and coach told the Swedish newspaper Expressen . Freddie Ljungberg has tipped Alexander Isak to take the next step and would welcome Arsenal signing his fellow Swede.

arts.ttl: Why Bukayo Saka missed Bournemouth vs Arsenal as Mikel Arteta explains injury fears
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has explained Bukayo Saka's absence from the Arsenal squad for the Premier League clash against Bournemouth. Arteta also stated in his press conference that he was hopeful that Saka would be back fit, and seemed positive about the chance of him making an appearance.

arts.ttl: Follow live: Arsenal continue title charge at Bournemouth
arts.sum: Arsenal look to maintain their Premier League title tilt with win over Bournemouth, but Mikel Arteta's team will have to do so without Bukayo Saka who misses out through injury

arts.ttl: Why Bukayo Saka was left out of Arsenal team to face Bournemouth
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka was omitted from the Arsenal matchday squad to face Bournemouth in the Premier League on Saturday. The winger was a slight doubt heading into the game after picking up an injury on international duty. He was taken off in the 51st minute of England’s 2-1 defeat to Greece at Wembley last Thursday. arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta explains Bukayo Saka absence from Arsenal matchday squad v Bournemouth
